entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The crop species being studied for resistance to Aceria cajani.

entities.name: ACERIA CAJANI
entities.description: The mite that acts as a vector for the pigeonpea sterility mosaic virus.

entities.name: PIGEONPEA STERILITY MOSAIC VIRUS
entities.description: The pathogen transmitted by Aceria cajani to pigeonpea.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of certain pigeonpea lines to resist infestation by Aceria cajani.

entities.name: LEAF CUTICLE
entities.description: The waxy layer covering the epidermis of the leaf.

entities.name: EPIDERMAL CELL WALL
entities.description: The cell wall of the leaf's epidermal cells.

entities.name: CUTICLE THICKNESS
entities.description: The measurement of the thickness of the leaf cuticle.

entities.name: STYLET LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the piercing-sucking mouthpart of Aceria cajani.

entities.name: LEAF ANATOMY
entities.description: The study of the structural organization of the leaf.
